summary: Backend refactor + new Trust system testing complete. All 28 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests PASSED - Hebrew RTL interface working, all data-testids verified, AI interpretations displaying correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactored from monolithic server.py into modular routes/, models/, services/ structure - WORKING
New Trust system endpoints working: POST /api/actions, POST /api/risk-signal, GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust
Value calculation correct: value = log(1 + impact) * authenticity
Risk calculation correct: risk = confidence * severity
Trust calculation correct: trust_score = value_score - risk_score
Valid action_types enforced: help, create, explore, contribute
Valid signal_types enforced: manipulation, aggression, spam, deception, disruption
Auth required for POST /api/actions (returns 401 without token)
Non-existent user rejection works (404 for risk-signal and trust profile)
Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI interpretation layer working via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full backend refactor verified. New Value+Risk+Trust system working with 3 endpoints: POST /api/actions (requires auth), POST /api/risk-signal (validates user exists), GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust (returns full trust profile). All existing endpoints preserved. Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI interpretation working. Hebrew RTL frontend displaying correctly.
